mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, DIVISION, BLOCK_YN, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{division}, #{blockYn}, #{useYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, PASSWORD AS password, NAME AS name, DIVISION AS division, BLOCK_YN AS blockYn, USE_YN AS useYn FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT user_id AS userId, user_bir AS userBir, user_mail AS userMail, user_no AS userNo, profile_img AS profileImg FROM member WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
NAME = #{name},
PASSWORD = #{password},
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
